name: whitebox
description: Configurable quality gates with structured verification reports

scripts.verify: npm run build && node dist/cli.js verify --config whitebox.config.json
scripts.verify:example: npm run build && node dist/cli.js verify --config examples/todo-app/whitebox.config.json
scripts.serve: npm run build && node dist/cli.js serve
scripts.mcp: npm run build && node dist/cli.js mcp
